mapper.select:
select count(1) from km_document d left join km_document_version pv on pv.doc_id = d.id and pv.version_status = 'PENDING_REVIEW' where (d.document_status = 'PENDING_REVIEW' or pv.version_no is not null) and d.is_deleted = 0
and d.kb_id = #{kbId}

select d.id as doc_id, d.kb_id, kb.name as kb_name, d.file_name as original_name, case when pv.version_no is not null then 'PENDING_REVIEW' else d.document_status end as status, (select count(1) from km_document_chunk c where c.doc_id = d.id and (c.is_active = 1 or c.version_no = pv.version_no)) as chunk_count from km_document d left join km_knowledge_base kb on d.kb_id = kb.id left join km_document_version pv on pv.doc_id = d.id and pv.version_status = 'PENDING_REVIEW' where d.id = #{docId} and d.is_deleted = 0
select tag_name from km_document_tag where doc_id = #{docId} order by id asc
select document_status from km_document where id = #{docId} and is_deleted = 0
select count(1) from km_document_chunk c join km_document d on d.id = c.doc_id where c.doc_id = #{docId} and c.is_active = 1 and c.version_no = d.current_version_no

select count(1) from km_document_chunk c join km_document d on d.id = c.doc_id where c.doc_id = #{docId} and c.is_active = 1 and c.version_no = d.current_version_no and coalesce(c.vector_status, '') != 'READY'
mapper.update: update km_document set document_status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{docId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into km_document_status_log(doc_id, stage, status, message, created_at) values(#{docId}, #{stage}, #{status}, #{message}, now())
